search.title: Search messages
search.degraded: Search is available, but some results may be missing.

prompt.title: Find a message
prompt.description: Search message text across the rooms you can read.

error.title: Search failed
error.description: Check your query and try again.

disabled.title: Search is disabled
disabled.description: The server operator has not enabled message search.

unavailable.title: Search is unavailable
unavailable.description: The search provider cannot answer right now.

indexing.title: Search is getting ready
indexing.description: Messages are being indexed. Search will become available automatically.
